sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and '[version]' = 'B' and GL > '3000000'
delete from TransX where  KeyID =  '[batchID]'  and Co like '599%' and not substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-ODY '
delete from TransX where  KeyID =  '[batchID]'  and Co = '9006' and not substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LG-CAD '
delete from TransX where  KeyID =  '[batchID]'  and Co = '9005' and not substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LS-SING'
delete from TransX where  KeyID =  '[batchID]'  and Co = '9231' and not substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LG-HUDC'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and GL = '2880000' and not TTY = '803'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and GL in ('2853500','2880000')
delete from TransX where  KeyID =  '[batchID]'  and not Co in ('2006','9006') and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LG-CAD '
Update TransX set BusCat = 'C' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat like '3%'
Update TransX set BusCat = 'D' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = '10'
Update TransX set BusCat = 'A' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat like '2%'
Update TransX set BusCat = 'C' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (substring(GL,1,2) in ('14','15','23') or GL like '287%') and not BusCat in ('A','D','C')
Update TransX set BusCat = 'A' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (GL like '6%' or GL = '4498000')
Update TransX set BusCat = 'A' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not BusCat in ('A','D','C')
Update TransX set Flex1 = (case when Co like '599%' or Co like '9%' then 'IFRS-17' else 'IFRS-4' end) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set Amt1 = Amt2 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and '[version]' = 'B' and Flex1 = 'IFRS-4'
Update TransX set Amt1 = Amt1 + Amt2 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and '[version]' <> 'B'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Flex1, Co, GL, BusCat, Amt1,Flex2) (select KeyID, Flex1, Co, GL, BusCat, round(sum(Amt1),2), 'pass1' as Flex2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  group by KeyID, Flex1, Co, GL, BusCat)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and Flex2 is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and Amt1 = 0
update x set GLdesc = c.Name from TransX x inner join COA c on x.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
insert into TransX (KeyID,Yr,Flex1) (select '[batchID]-data3',Field1,Descr from Misc_Tables where Table_ID = 'Review Notes' and ID = 'M14')
insert into TransX (KeyID,Yr,Flex1) (select '[batchID]-data2',Field1,Descr from Misc_Tables where Table_ID = 'Review Notes' and ID = 'M14')

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, BusCat, Amt2,Amt1) values ('[batchID]',
